app_description: Intelligent chat client for interacting with local OpenAI-compatible APIs

feature_list.title: Features:
feature_list.real_time_chat: • Real-time chat with local large models

commands.ask_question: • Enter any question to chat with AI
commands.quit: • Enter 'quit' or 'exit' to quit the program
commands.info: • Enter 'info' to view current API configuration
commands.image: • Enter 'image' to get the latest image from server and perform multimodal Q&A
commands.multiturn: • Enter 'multiturn' to enter multi-turn chat mode
commands.single: • Enter 'single' to exit multi-turn chat mode
commands.lang_switch: • Enter 'lang en' to switch to English, 'lang zh' to switch to Chinese

messages.enter_custom_api: Enter custom API address (press Enter to use default):
messages.enter_custom_model: Enter custom model name (press Enter to use default):
messages.connection_success: ✅ Successfully connected to local API service
messages.connection_warning: ⚠️  API service may be running but not responding correctly
messages.connection_advice: Please ensure local API service is running
messages.goodbye: 👋 Goodbye! Thank you for using Openterface AI Chat Client
messages.multiturn_info_1: In this mode, you can have continuous conversations
messages.multiturn_info_2: Enter 'single' to exit multi-turn chat mode
messages.multiturn_info_3: Enter 'image' to use images in current conversation
messages.multiturn_info_4: Enter 'clear' to clear current chat history
messages.retry_advice: Please retry or check API service status
messages.enter_model: Enter model name (press Enter to keep default):
messages.lang_invalid: ❌ Invalid language code, please use 'en' or 'zh'

api_errors.timeout: ❌ Request timed out, please check if local API service is running
api_errors.connection_error: ❌ Cannot connect to local API service, please ensure API service is running

image_server.timeout: ⏰ Receive timeout, data may be incomplete
image_server.refused_error: ❌ Connection refused, please ensure server is running
